title: RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT - 211info
text: ADDICTIONS RECOVERY CENTER RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers medically monitored detoxification, chemical dependency treatment and supports, pain management, and mental health services. Planned regimen of professionally directed evaluation, observation, and addiction treatment in an inpatient setting. 1025 E Main Street Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 779-1282 2 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-1282 ext 2 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Sliding scale fee, accepts OHP and most private insurance DOCUMENTS: Drivers license or state ID card, proof of income, proof of insurance LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon (priority given to Jackson County residents) SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - OUTPATIENT TREATMENT AND MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
